name: EuiExpression

aria-label.description:
Defines a string value that labels the current element.
@see aria-labelledby.

isActive.description: Adds an solid border at the bottom

onClick.description: Turns the component into a button and adds an editable style border at the bottom

display.description: Sets the display style for the expression. Defaults to `inline`

isInvalid.description: Forces color to display as `danger` and shows an `error` icon

descriptionWidth.description:
Sets a custom width for the description when using the columns layout.
Set to a number for a custom width in `px`.
Set to a string for a custom width in custom measurement.
Defaults to `20%`

textWrap.description: Sets how to handle the wrapping of long text.

example: <EuiExpression color="success" display="inline" textWrap="break-word" descriptionWidth="20%" uppercase description="Hello" value="World" />
